EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user with ID {subject.account.id} executed the operation "{object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
The process with PID {subject.process.id} failed to execute the operation "{object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} changed LSM configuration on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} failed to execute the operation "{object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
The process with PID {subject.process.id} executed the operation "{object.value}" on host {event_src.host}
